basics.name: Aziz Rahmad
basics.label: Senior Software Developer
basics.summary: Experienced software developer with a proven track record in developing and supporting enterprise software solutions across diverse markets --> Indonesia, Australia, and New Zealand. Demonstrated proficiency in English and collaboration within multinational teams. Strong academic foundation with a master's degree in computer science and experience delivering lectures at universities. Passionate about learning and keeping up with the latest technologies.

work.name: NTainers.co Pty Ltd
work.summary: Maintain and enhance a platform that leverages artificial intelligence to optimize logistics operations, Supply Chain Management (SCM), and Transport Management Systems (TMS).
highlights: Automated document submissions to integrated TMS using LLM technology
Developed features facilitating automated integration between clients and freight forwarders/cartage companies
Developed AI-powered integration platform (Mappr.ai) automating data mapping, transformation, and workflow orchestration
Fixed bugs and improved AI-powered Workflow Studio for API route generation
Built AI chat interface add-in (Cargo Chat for Outlook) with Node.JS TypeScript connecting to NTainers.co Cargo Chat service
Utilized Office JavaScript API and ChatGPT for context-aware email replies in one click
Performed extensive refactor on Cargo Chat logic and redesigned LLM pipeline --> INCREASED RESPONSE SPEED BY 75%

work.name: Primakara University
work.summary: Delivering lectures on Computer Science topics.

work.name: Mitrais
work.summary: Developed high-quality software solutions while collaborating within cross-functional, international agile teams. Tested, debugged, and coordinated with QA to validate software readiness. Reviewed code and provided expertise to junior team members.
highlights: Developed and maintained HRMS product with CI/CD focus
Acted as Scrum Master on rotation
Supported client enterprise solutions' HR and Payroll modules for multinational clients
Converted project libraries from VB.NET to C#

work.name: CODE.ID
work.summary: Designed, coded, tested, and managed various applications while collaborating with engineering and product teams. Developed automated tests and conducted performance tuning.
highlights: Developed new modules for Tax Automation web application for major Indonesian bank
Developed new modules for Employee Connection web application
Notable: Corporate Tax module, Accrual & Prepayment module, Industrial Relations module (manages rule violations and performance records)
